hero.heading: Your first visit,
hero.subhead: Everything you need to know before you arrive. We made this part easy on purpose.

newPatient.heading: What to bring on
newPatient.note: Your first appointment is longer than you might expect — we want to understand your full health picture, not just check a box.

checklist: Relevant medical records or lab results
Completed new patient forms (sent before your visit)

insurance.heading: Most plans
insurance.note: We also offer self-pay options. Call our office to verify your specific plan before your first visit — we're happy to help.

faqs.a: Yes — we are actively welcoming new patients. Book an appointment online or call us at (772) 569-3212 to get started.
We accept most major insurance plans including Medicare, Blue Cross Blue Shield, Aetna, Cigna, United Healthcare, and others. Call our office to verify your specific plan before your first visit.

faqs.q: How do I transfer from Vero Beach Pediatrics?
faqs.a: Transferring is simple — we already have a relationship with the VBP team. Call our office and let us know you're a VBP family. We'll coordinate your records and make the transition as seamless as possible.

faqs.q: What is the same-day sick visit policy?
faqs.a: Call or message us through the patient portal in the morning. We reserve same-day slots for acute illness and will do our best to see you the same day you call.

faqs.q: What should I bring to my first appointment?
faqs.a: Please bring a valid photo ID, your insurance card, a list of current medications and dosages, any relevant medical records or lab results, and a list of questions or concerns you'd like to discuss.
Yes, telehealth visits are available for appropriate follow-ups and consultations. Contact our office to determine if your visit qualifies for a virtual appointment.

cta.heading: Ready when you are.
cta.subhead: New patients are always welcome. Book your first visit online or give us a call.
